roles_code_system_idx.name: roles_code_system_idx
roles_code_system_idx.where: store_fk IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

roles_code_store_idx.name: roles_code_store_idx
roles_code_store_idx.where: store_fk IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

roles_name_system_idx.name: roles_name_system_idx
roles_name_system_idx.where: store_fk IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

roles_name_store_idx.name: roles_name_store_idx
roles_name_store_idx.where: store_fk IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

routes_path_app_idx.name: routes_path_app_idx
routes_path_app_idx.where: app_code IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

designation_code_system_idx.name: designation_code_system_idx
designation_code_system_idx.where: store_fk IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

designation_code_store_idx.name: designation_code_store_idx
designation_code_store_idx.where: store_fk IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

designation_name_system_idx.name: designation_name_system_idx
designation_name_system_idx.where: store_fk IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

designation_name_store_idx.name: designation_name_store_idx
designation_name_store_idx.where: store_fk IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

address_one_default_idx.name: address_one_default_idx
address_one_default_idx.where: is_default_address = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

address_one_billing_idx.name: address_one_billing_idx
address_one_billing_idx.where: is_billing_address = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

address_state_fk_or_text_chk.name: address_state_fk_or_text_chk
address_state_fk_or_text_chk.value: state_region_province_fk IS NULL OR state_region_province_text IS NULL

address_district_fk_or_text_chk.name: address_district_fk_or_text_chk
address_district_fk_or_text_chk.value: district_fk IS NULL OR district_text IS NULL

communication_at_least_one_value_chk.name: communication_at_least_one_value_chk
communication_at_least_one_value_chk.value:
(
    email IS NOT NULL OR
    fax IS NOT NULL OR
    phone_number IS NOT NULL OR
    website IS NOT NULL
  )

communication_dial_country_requires_phon.name: communication_dial_country_requires_phone_chk

contact_person_one_primary_idx.name: contact_person_one_primary_idx
contact_person_one_primary_idx.where: is_primary = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

volumes_no_self_reference_chk.name: volumes_no_self_reference_chk
volumes_no_self_reference_chk.value: base_volume_fk IS NULL OR base_volume_fk <> id
